articles.title: Vijay Karur visit LIVE: CM reaches Karur, people queue along the highway
articles.sum: Extensive security arrangements have been put in place across Karur for the Chief Minister's visit, with barricades, QR code-enabled entry passes for participants and heavy police deployment at all venues.
